note: Scores provided by client. PSI API rate-limited at measurement time. Detailed metrics estimated from HTML source analysis — re-run PSI to confirm exact LCP/TBT/CLS values.

metrics_estimated.note: Estimated from source analysis — confirm via PSI before each optimisation

mobile.LCP: ~5–7s (poor) — hero PNG not WebP; 20+ render-blocking CSS sheets
mobile.FCP: ~3–5s (poor) — large CSS payload blocks first paint

identified_issues.description: jquery.min.js and jquery-migrate.min.js loaded without defer in <head>. Both are synchronous, blocking the parser on every page load.
WP Engine page cache bypassed on every request (x-cacheable: NO:Set Known Cookie). WooCommerce session cookie forces uncached PHP rendering for all visitors.

20+ CSS stylesheets loaded synchronously in <head>, including Font Awesome loaded TWICE (v4 shim + v5 all = ~80KB duplicated icon CSS), WooCommerce CSS on non-shop pages, dashicons, and plugin-specific CSS.
LCP image (hero award badge) served as PNG. WebP equivalent would be ~30–50% smaller. Image is preloaded correctly but format is unoptimised.
Google Tag Manager domain (googletagmanager.com) uses dns-prefetch only. Upgrading to preconnect saves the TLS handshake time (~100–150ms).
